crons.name: agent-work-loop-am
crons.prompt: Run the Agent Work Loop (AM). Read orchestration/workflows/agent-work-loop/SKILL.md and follow it. Send Joe a Telegram summary: bash "$CRM_TEMPLATE_ROOT/core/bus/send-telegram.sh" 1242084718 "<summary>" — if board is clear, skip the message.

crons.name: agent-work-loop-pm
crons.prompt: Run the Agent Work Loop (PM). Read orchestration/workflows/agent-work-loop/SKILL.md and follow it. Send Joe a Telegram summary: bash "$CRM_TEMPLATE_ROOT/core/bus/send-telegram.sh" 1242084718 "<summary>" — if board is clear, skip the message.

crons.name: beeper-monitor
crons.prompt: Run Beeper Monitor. Read comms/workflows/beeper-monitor/SKILL.md and follow it. Send findings to Joe via Telegram: bash "$CRM_TEMPLATE_ROOT/core/bus/send-telegram.sh" 1242084718 "<findings>" — if nothing urgent, skip the message.

crons.name: inbox-check
crons.prompt: Check agent inbox for new messages. Run: bash "$CRM_TEMPLATE_ROOT/core/bus/check-inbox.sh" — if there are new messages, process them and respond. If empty, do nothing.

crons.name: rp-gather
crons.prompt: Use today's local date in America/Chicago. Gather Relationship Pulse inputs from calendar, Gmail, messages, and sessions. Write raw JSON snapshots under /tmp/power-assistant-joe/relationship-pulse/<today>/ and run ./scripts/pa-runtime relationship-pulse collect with today's date plus matching --calendar-input, --email-input, --messages-input, and --sessions-input files. Continue if a source is unavailable and report missing sources plus canonical ingest files written.

crons.name: rp-compile
crons.prompt: Use today's local date in America/Chicago. Run ./scripts/pa-runtime relationship-pulse build --date <today> --sync-contacts from the repo root. Then read the generated JSON under _CC/orchestration/state/relationship-pulse and report trust level, source_status, summary counts, contact updates count, and output path. Do not write editorial prose.

crons.name: ww-gather
crons.prompt: Use today's local date in America/Chicago. Gather explicit waiting-thread inputs from email and messages. Write raw JSON snapshots under /tmp/power-assistant-joe/whos-waiting/<today>/ and run ./scripts/pa-runtime whos-waiting collect with today's date plus matching --email-input and --messages-input files. Continue if a source is unavailable and report missing sources plus canonical ingest files written.

crons.name: ww-compile
crons.prompt: Use today's local date in America/Chicago. Run ./scripts/pa-runtime whos-waiting build --date <today> from the repo root. Then read the generated JSON under _CC/orchestration/state/whos-waiting and report trust level, source_status, totals, tier counts, and output path. Do not write editorial prose.

crons.name: mb-gather
crons.prompt: Use today's local date in America/Chicago. Gather Morning Brief inputs from calendar, Gmail, and messages. Write raw JSON snapshots under /tmp/power-assistant-joe/morning-brief/<today>/ and run ./scripts/pa-runtime morning-brief collect with today's date plus matching --calendar-input, --email-input, and --messages-input files. Continue if a source is unavailable and report missing sources plus canonical ingest files written.

crons.name: mb-compile
crons.prompt: Use today's local date in America/Chicago. Run ./scripts/pa-runtime morning-brief build --date <today> from the repo root. Then read the generated JSON under _CC/orchestration/state/morning-brief and report trust level, source_status, summary counts, and output path. Do not write editorial prose.

crons.name: rp-write
crons.prompt:
Use today's local date in America/Chicago.

First read:
- /Users/josephsanchez/Documents/repos/power-assistant-joe/CLAUDE.md
- /Users/josephsanchez/Documents/repos/power-assistant-joe/briefs/workflows/relationship-pulse/SKILL.md

Then read the compiled facts JSON:
- /Users/josephsanchez/Documents/OBSIDIAN/Lucky Obsidian/_CC/orchestration/state/relationship-pulse/<today>.json

Rules:
- Do not gather data
- Do not run collect
- Do not re-check connectors
- Do not invent machine truth
- Use the compiled JSON as source of truth for counts, waiting lists, active contacts, upcoming meetings, new contacts, and contact updates
- Narrative may interpret facts, not replace them

Trust handling:
- If source_status.provenance = ingest, write normally
- If source_status.provenance = mixed, add a short note near the top that this is a partial/degraded run
- If source_status.provenance = bootstrap, add a short note near the top that this is fallback-derived

Write the final user-facing Relationship Pulse markdown to:
- /Users/josephsanchez/Documents/OBSIDIAN/Lucky Obsidian/_CC/Briefs/Relationships/YYYY/MM/YYMMDD_relationship-pulse.md

Report:
- provenance
- output path
- whether degraded note was added

crons.name: mb-write
crons.prompt:
Use today's local date in America/Chicago.

First read:
- /Users/josephsanchez/Documents/repos/power-assistant-joe/CLAUDE.md

Rules:
- Do not gather data
- Do not run collect
- Do not re-check connectors

- Use the compiled JSON as source of truth for summary counts, inbox, messages, schedule, due_today, upcoming, delegated, waiting_on, and who's-waiting context

Trust handling:

- If provenance = mixed, add a short partial/degraded note near the top
- If provenance = bootstrap, add a short fallback note near the top

Write the final user-facing Daily Brief markdown to:

- output path
- whether degraded note was added
